data.description: a master of song, speech, and the magic they contain

features.name: Jack-of-All-Trades
features.description: The bard can add their proficiency bonus to any ability check they make that doesn't already include their proficiency bonus.

features.name: Font of Inspiration
features.description: Once per turn, the bard can use a bonus action to gain advantage on one Charisma (Persuasion) check, Deception check, or Intimidation check of their choice for the next hour.

features.name: Sundering Voice
features.description: The bard's voice can shatter concrete and crush stone.

features.name: Catalyst
features.description: When you cast a spell using your reaction (see above), the spell's damage dice are doubled.

data.description:
a half-elf in rugged leathers finds knowledge springing into her mind,
conjured forth by the magic of her song-knowledge
of the people who constructed the monument and the
mythic saga it depicts.
data.name: Music
Magic
Armar
